# Generated Approved Phrases

## Strong Openings

- Hi [Name],
- Hello [Name],

## Strong Closings

- Best,
- Best regards,
- Regards,
- If there is anything else we can do to assist please don't hesitate to ask.
- Please let me know if you have any questions or need assistance with the app.
- So just want to sync up on the antenna you guys are using and the direction you are aiming, we can work from there.
- Let me know if you have any questions!
- Let me know how the testing goes and if you need any help.
- If you have any questions for me, please let me know.
- Kind regards,
